title: Better Pillager
body:
**Better Pillager**

Tired of the same old pillagers? Better Pillager upgrades your Minecraft raids with new enemies, unique mechanics, and a powerful boss to challenge even the strongest players.

![better pillager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73cfc224e25ba2d82225cf3ff31a2fd1c359c878.png)

- ⚔️ New Enemies

TNT Pillager – Explodes upon death, taking you (and everything nearby) with it. Stay alert.
Ninja Pillager – Fast, deadly, and hard to hit. Low health, but don’t underestimate its speed.
Knight Pillager – A skilled swordsman ready to fight you head-on.
Scorpion – A dangerous creature added to support pillagers in battle.
Mega Pillager – A massive brute with knockback resistance. It hits extremely hard and won’t be pushed back.

- 👑 Boss Fight

Pillager King – The ultimate challenge. Defeat him to obtain a cheated totem, a powerful reward that can save you in the toughest situations.

- 🔥 Features

More variety in raids
Unique combat styles for each enemy
Increased difficulty and fun
A rewarding boss battle

If you want more action, more danger, and more chaos in your world, Better Pillager is for you.
